seoTitle: Lewisham vs Leycester — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lewisham and Leycester. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lewisham and Leycester.
heading: Lewisham vs Leycester — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lewisham, New South Wales and Leycester, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Leycester has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Lewisham (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lewisham or Leycester safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lewisham has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Leycester scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lewisham scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Leycester scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lewisham or Leycester?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Leycester has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
